summary: iter55.29 — Admin-controlled `is_convertible_to` flag on Currency. Full backend + frontend testing. Backend guard in POST /api/vip/convert rejects non-convertible destinations with Spanish 400, does not touch P2P orders or source-side. Frontend hides non-convertible currencies from BalanceConverterCard destination dropdown and shows 'Sólo entrada' amber badge + toggle switch in Admin currencies UI. All checks pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend Currency Pydantic model uses `is_convertible_to: bool = True`, but GET /api/currencies OMITS the field entirely for legacy rows (Mongo docs without the flag). Frontend filter `c.is_convertible_to !== false` treats missing as truthy so it works correctly, but this is inconsistent JSON surface. Recommend explicit Currency.model_validate + dict() so the default surfaces on the wire — improves discoverability for API consumers.

The guard in routes/orders.py (~L508-528) queries `db.currencies.find_one({code: to_code})` on every /vip/convert call. If Currency lookup is already done downstream for validation, consider merging both lookups to avoid a duplicate query (micro-opt, non-blocking).

test_vip_convert.py::test_usd_to_cup_via_inverse_rate fails (398 vs 395) — PRE-EXISTING seed drift unrelated to iter55.29. The USD→CUP rate stored in DB in preview is 398 not 395 (seed vs current). Not part of this iteration's scope but flagging for hygiene.

The seed in routes/admin.py L696 marks NEW USD (Zelle) rows with is_convertible_to=False, but the EXISTING preview USD row (created 2026-06-15) still lacks the flag → treated as convertible by default (backward compat). Operator will need to manually toggle USD via /admin/currencies UI on existing deployments — worth documenting in the release notes.

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 iter55.29 targeted; 50/51 regression, 1 pre-existing unrelated failure)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 flows verified: admin table badge, admin editor toggle, VIP converter dropdown filter)

seed_data_creation: Seeded ephemeral currency ZELLE_TST (is_convertible_to=false, fiat, delivery_methods=[transfer]) for the frontend flow, then deleted. Backend pytest suite seeds+cleans USDT29/ZELLE29/CUP29 per test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter55.29 fully validated. Backend: 6/6 targeted tests pass (test_iter55_29_convertible_destination_flag.py — must run from /app/backend cwd because it imports `from tests.conftest import ...`). Regression on vip_convert + residue + lenient + subtyped + permissions = 50/51 (1 unrelated seed drift). Frontend: (a) /admin/currencies shows new CONVERTIBLE column with green ✓ for convertible and amber 'Sólo entrada' badge for non-convertible; (b) editor dialog exposes `currency-convertible-toggle` switch with descriptive helper text 'Si está desactivado, los clientes NO podrán convertir sus saldos hacia esta moneda...No afecta órdenes P2P ni retiros' — great UX copy; (c) VIP /dashboard BalanceConverterCard destination Select correctly filters out is_convertible_to=false entries via `.filter((c) => c.code !== fromCode && c.is_convertible_to !== false)`. Data-testids all match the review request exactly. No mocked APIs.

verified_matrix.POST /api/vip/convert to non-convertible: 400 with Spanish 'no puede enviar' + code — PASS
